zh.lifeSummary: 當Desiderata de Leybourne於1269年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊波恩時，她的父親William de Leybourne28歲，母親Juliana de Sandwich15歲。她和Geoffrey de Lucy至少有1個兒子。她去世於1330年1月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Desiderata de Leybourne于1269年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊波恩时，她的父亲William de Leybourne28岁，母亲Juliana de Sandwich15岁。她和Geoffrey de Lucy至少有1个儿子。她去世于1330年1月之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

en.lifeSummary: When Desiderata de Leybourne was born in 1269, in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Leybourne, was 28 and her mother, Juliana de Sandwich, was 15. She had at least 1 son with Geoffrey de Lucy. She died after January 1330.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Desiderata de Leybourne est née en 1269, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Leybourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Sandwich, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Geoffrey de Lucy. Elle est décédée après janvier 1330.

de.lifeSummary: Als Desiderata de Leybourne 1269 in Leybourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Leybourne 28 und ihre Mutter Juliana de Sandwich 15. Sie hatte mit Geoffrey de Lucy mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach Januar 1330.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Desiderata de Leybourne è nata il nel 1269 nel Leybourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Leybourne, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Juliana de Sandwich, aveva 15 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Geoffrey de Lucy. Morì dopo il gennaio 1330.

ja.lifeSummary: Desiderata de Leybourneが1269年にイギリスイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父William de Leybourneは28歳，母Juliana de Sandwichは15歳であった。彼女はGeoffrey de Lucyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1330年1月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Desiderata de Leybourne(이)가 1269년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Leybourne(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana de Sandwich(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Geoffrey de Lucy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 1월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Desiderata de Leybourne nasceu em 1269, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Leybourne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Sandwich, tinha 15 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Geoffrey de Lucy. Ela faleceu após janeiro de 1330.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Desiderata de Leybourne родилась в 1269 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Leybourne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Sandwich, 15. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Geoffrey de Lucy. Она умерла после январь 1330 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Desiderata de Leybourne nació en 1269, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Leybourne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Juliana de Sandwich, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Geoffrey de Lucy. Murió después de enero de 1330.
